column1: Hey Jacqueline, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
The grand oasis March 15-19 Flying from MCO (nonstop best) saw there were flights on spirit So far 3 girls in room
Aight bet! Will hook it up. Which school you all from?
I'm actually the mom lol. They are from UCF
Lol got ya! Well we appreciate you taking the lead for the group
gonna put the info together for you now, were you lookin to get things booked tonight?
Probably tomorrow but could be tonight. I need all the girls info
Gotcha. Would you be okay getting flights separately on your own to save money? It's the best way to save
I don't mind that. I just would like to make sure they have transfers. Is that possible through hotel?
Yea we handle all of that still!
Loved “Yea we handle all of that still!”
I'll send all the info you need for them. Is it okay if I send most of it through email?
Yes. Jacquireinhardt@gmail.com That's my daughter but I have access
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Yes I see it. Ty. Let me get in touch with the girls. I'll get back shortly!
awesome let me know what they think!
heyy Jacqueline whats up, how we feelin about those options so far?
Hi. Sorry I haven't gotten back to you. The girls have class all day today
all good! yea just let me know when you speak to them
Hi! Ok. They all agreed on Cancun - let me know next steps
okay awesome. I'll set up the reservation now and send it over. they'll each follow the portal link, create their account, and make their payment
ah! just realized as well, our Grand Oasis option is no longer available for the 15-19. itll have to be the 18th-22nd. is that okay
okay, let me know. things have been selling fast and just became unavailable
Is the hotel in Cancun the same price
Ok those dates are great. Do you need all their meals individually? Or can Jacqueline forward?
she can just forward the link over to everyone and they can add their own details
Ok. Send over now - I'm booking flights this second
Sounds good will send in 5 min
Liked “she can just forward the link over to everyone and they can add their own details”
K-PLEASE make sure you hold one room. I'm trying to get all their info and who's at work- in the library etc! We will have this done tonight

Hi. So I looked at the "bill". Is there any way possible please that payment / confirmation can be tomorrow or even the next day. My daughter is just waiting for confirmation from her job (I know it will happen but she's very nervous to get fired )
Hello. Please let me know. She's a very responsible (nervous) person lol.
Hi! Sorry I missed your previous text
Is she the only one that needs more time?
If we can get the others situated, it'll be easiest to get her added in a day
If we wait til tomorrow / Thursday, we risk rooms selling out
Wait so here is a question. If the other two girls "book" tonight and god forbid my daughter can't join what is the refund policy. I'm thinking it passed because it's like 5 minutes away lol .
If they add the optional travel protection insurance they can cancel at any time for any reason
Ok. I didn't get that far yet - I'll let them know. I'm determined to figure this out by tonight / tomorrow morning. I've spent hours! And you are THE BEST
thank you much appreciated! please let me know if they need anything
Ok she's approved. Is room still good????
Should they add protection plan? How much is it. And is that "insurance" for when they travel?
Nvm disregard last text. But please is the room still good????
Yea I saw the confirmation come through!
hey whenever you get a chance, if you could have everyone upload their flight info so that we can coordinate airport transfers for the group
hey hey, I emailed over details on how to find our transportation service when you land and some more info
did y'all wan to add any of the party pass events or booze cruise ticket to your trip?
